Privacy is a big concern these days.
There was a glitch in the system.
The game has some minor glitches.
The video call requires a lot of bandwidth.
We need to increase our bandwidth.
All messages are protected with encryption.
End-to-end encryption keeps your data safe.
The firewall blocked the suspicious connection.
Make sure your firewall is up to date.

meaning: 이를 악물고 참다, 어쩔 수 없이 받아들이다

examples.text: Just bite the bullet and apologize.
We bit the bullet and paid the extra cost.
examples.translation: 어쩔 수 없이 추가 비용을 냈어.

word: Hit the nail on the head

examples.text: You hit the nail on the head with that comment.
She hit the nail on the head as usual.
I'm still on the fence about the job offer.
examples.translation: 아직 그 취업 제안에 대해 결정을 못 내리겠어.

examples.text: He's on the fence about moving abroad.
examples.translation: 그는 해외 이사를 할지 말지 고민 중이야.

examples.text: Don't spill the beans about the surprise party.
Who spilled the beans?
Don't burn bridges when you quit a job.
examples.translation: 직장 그만둘 때 관계를 끊지 마.

examples.text: He burned bridges with his whole team.

word: Cost an arm and a leg

examples.text: That bag costs an arm and a leg.
Medical bills here cost an arm and a leg.
Don't jump the gun — wait for confirmation.
I jumped the gun and ordered too early.
These shoes are on sale this week.
Is this jacket on sale?
Sorry, that size is sold out.
The limited edition is already sold out.
I'm just window shopping today.
Window shopping is my favorite hobby.
I'm ready to check out.
The checkout line is really long.
Can I try this on?
You should try it on before buying.
It should clear up by afternoon.
The rain cleared up really fast.
I heard thunder — a storm is coming.
My dog is scared of thunder.
It's below freezing tonight.
Bundle up — it's well below freezing out there.
The weather is mild today — perfect for a walk.
Spring here is mild and pleasant.
We're in the middle of a heat wave.
The heat wave is expected to last all week.
examples.translation: 폭염이 이번 주 내내 계속될 것 같아.

examples.text: Be careful — the roads are slippery.
The sidewalk is slippery from the ice.
The wind chill makes it feel like -15.
Watch out for the wind chill factor today.
Do you get along with your coworkers?
We didn't get along at first, but now we're close.
examples.translation: 처음엔 잘 못 지냈는데 지금은 친해.

examples.text: We drifted apart after college.
It's sad when you drift apart from old friends.
Have you two made up yet?
We fought but made up the next day.
We fell out over something stupid.
They fell out and haven't spoken since.
examples.translation: 걔들 사이가 틀어진 뒤로 연락을 안 하더라.

examples.text: Let's catch up over coffee sometime.
It was great catching up with you!
They had a falling-out over money.
I had a falling-out with my best friend.
I reconnected with an old friend on social media.
examples.translation: 소셜 미디어에서 옛 친구와 다시 연락됐어.

examples.text: It's nice to reconnect with people from the past.
examples.translation: 과거 사람들과 다시 연결되는 게 좋더라.

examples.text: That relationship was really toxic.
I had to cut off a toxic friend.
Good friends always support each other.
We support each other through hard times.
I picked up guitar during the pandemic.
She picked up painting as a hobby.
I sketch in my notebook every morning.
She's really good at sketching portraits.
I binge-watched the whole series in one day.
examples.translation: 그 시리즈를 하루 만에 다 몰아봤어.

examples.text: We binge-watched three episodes last night.
We hiked up the mountain last weekend.
Hiking is great for both body and mind.
She knits scarves for everyone in winter.
I learned to knit during lockdown.
He collects vintage records.
I collect stamps from every country I visit.
I've been blogging about food for two years.
She blogs about her travels.
I volunteer at a local shelter on weekends.
Volunteering makes me feel good.
I journal every night before bed.
examples.translation: 나 매일 밤 자기 전에 일기 써.

examples.text: Journaling helps me process my thoughts.
I work as a freelancer from home.
Being a freelancer means flexible hours.
I'm doing an internship at a tech company.
The intern did a great job on the project.
I've been doing remote work for two years.
Remote work saves so much commute time.
She got a promotion last month.
I'm hoping for a promotion this year.
He resigned from his position yesterday.
I'm thinking about resigning.
The deadline is this Friday.
I always work better under a deadline.
examples.translation: 나는 마감이 있을 때 더 잘 돼.

examples.text: My workload has doubled this month.
examples.translation: 이번 달에 업무량이 두 배로 늘었어.

examples.text: The workload is manageable for now.
He was laid off due to budget cuts.
A lot of people were laid off last quarter.
She's really easygoing — never stressed.
examples.translation: 그녀는 정말 느긋해. 절대 스트레스 안 받아.

examples.text: I like his easygoing personality.
She always has a witty comeback.
examples.translation: 그녀는 항상 재치 있는 받아치기를 해.

examples.text: He's witty and fun to be around.
examples.translation: 그는 재치 있어서 같이 있으면 재미있어.

examples.text: My boss is really laid-back about deadlines.
I wish I could be more laid-back.
examples.translation: 나도 좀 더 여유로울 수 있으면 좋겠어.

examples.text: He made an impulsive decision to quit.
I tend to be impulsive when I'm tired.
examples.translation: 피곤할 때 충동적이 되는 경향이 있어.

examples.text: He gets really competitive during games.
examples.translation: 그는 게임할 때 경쟁심이 엄청 강해져.

examples.text: Being competitive helps her succeed.
examples.translation: 경쟁심이 강한 게 그녀가 성공하는 데 도움이 돼.

examples.text: Try not to be so pessimistic about things.
examples.translation: 일에 대해 너무 비관적으로 생각하지 마.

examples.text: He's pessimistic about the future.
She's very empathetic — she really listens.
examples.translation: 그녀는 공감 능력이 뛰어나. 진심으로 들어줘.

examples.text: Being empathetic makes you a better friend.
examples.translation: 공감 능력이 있으면 더 좋은 친구가 돼.

examples.text: I'm so indecisive when it comes to food.
Stop being indecisive and just pick one.
I feel completely overwhelmed right now.
She was overwhelmed with joy.
I'm so relieved the exam is over.
We were relieved to hear the good news.
There's a certain melancholy to autumn.
I felt a wave of melancholy out of nowhere.
This song makes me feel nostalgic.
I get nostalgic about my school days.
Does this come with a warranty?
The warranty covers repairs for one year.
Don't cut corners on safety.
examples.translation: 안전 절차는 대충 하면 안 돼.

examples.text: They cut corners to save money.

word: The ball is in your court

examples.text: I made my offer — the ball is in your court.
examples.translation: 내 제안은 했어. 이제 네가 결정할 차례야.

examples.text: The ball is in your court now.
It's pouring outside — stay in.
examples.translation: 밖에 비가 억수같이 와. 그냥 있어.

examples.text: I got soaked because it started pouring.
It's overcast but not raining.
The sky has been overcast all day.
We grew apart after moving to different cities.
It's natural to grow apart sometimes.
I read to unwind after work.
examples.translation: 퇴근 후 긴장 풀려고 책 읽어.

examples.text: Gaming helps me unwind.
examples.translation: 게임이 긴장 푸는 데 도움이 돼.

examples.text: I'm still in my probation period.
She passed her probation with great reviews.
examples.translation: 그녀는 좋은 평가를 받으며 수습 기간을 통과했어.

examples.text: My commute takes about an hour.
I commute by subway every day.
It's cheaper to bulk buy at Costco.
I bulk bought snacks for the trip.
Do you have a loyalty card for points?
I collect points on my loyalty card.
I bought this second-hand — it was half price.
I love shopping at second-hand stores.
She's very opinionated about politics.
examples.translation: 그녀는 정치에 대해 자기 주장이 강해.

examples.text: He's opinionated but usually right.
You can't sit on the fence forever.
Stop sitting on the fence and decide.
Drive carefully — it's really foggy.
The bridge is barely visible — it's so foggy.
examples.translation: 안개가 너무 짙어서 다리가 거의 안 보여.

examples.text: Check the price tag before you buy.
The price tag was still on the gift.
We have a 3-hour layover in Tokyo.
The layover was long but I explored the airport.
I'm still dealing with jet lag.
Jet lag hit me hard this time.
Make sure your carry-on fits in the overhead bin.
I only packed a carry-on for the weekend trip.
The line at customs was really long.
Declare everything at customs.
I love trying local cuisine when I travel.
examples.translation: 여행 가면 현지 음식 먹는 걸 좋아해.

examples.text: The local cuisine here is incredible.
We spent the day sightseeing downtown.
What's worth sightseeing here?
I stayed at a hostel to save money.
Hostels are great for meeting travelers.

meaning: 관광지가 아닌 잘 알려지지 않은 곳

examples.text: I prefer going off the beaten path.
examples.translation: 나는 잘 알려지지 않은 곳 가는 걸 좋아해.

examples.text: We found a great café off the beaten path.
examples.translation: 잘 알려지지 않은 멋진 카페를 발견했어.

examples.text: I always buy souvenirs for my family.
What souvenirs should I get in Jeju?
How much is a round trip ticket to Paris?
I booked a round trip for next month.
She's very adaptable — she fits in anywhere.
examples.translation: 그녀는 적응력이 뛰어나서 어디서든 잘 어울려.

examples.text: Being adaptable is key in a fast-changing world.
